name: Scavenger||rainworld
description:
🔆"never trust anyone"🔆

the scavenger is one of artificer's pups , in this au the pups survived because they where saved by a group of fellow slug cats .

hes a mint color and has a torn ear a missing leg and lots of scars

pronouns: he/him

mod: concentrated

opinions on his mother : he thinks that artificer abandoned them and left them to die and because of that his extremely grateful to the tribe of slugcats that saved him and his siblings

job: hunter for the tribe

abilities:

scavenging: when this ability is used they are stronger and a bit faster than before they can make things explode in 10 foot radius for 2 minutes

exploiting: abel to make his tail blow up to reach high places and escaping also works a lot for hunting

stats kinda:

very very slow since his missing a leg

pretty strong

agile
creator: BUTTER-star
